name: Thai Nondestructive Testing Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Nondestructive Testing Public Company Limited, a technical service company, provides nondestructive engineering services in Thailand. It operates through two segments, Nondestructive Testing Services, and Inspection Services for Pressure Vessel and Others. The company offers a range of conventional inspection services, including ultrasonic, radiography, eddy current, magnetic particle, liquid penetrant, positive material identification, and visual services. It also provides advance nondestructive testing technology and inspection techniques, such as above ground storage tank program, pipeline radiography, small controlled area radiography, remote visual inspection, positive material identification, and liquid pressure test packs. In addition, the company engages in the rendering excavation and transportation services of coal for the coal mine concessionaire; generation and sale of electricity from coal-fired thermal power; and procurement and servicing of public utility systems and other related businesses, as well as offers advisory services for engineering. Further, it provides engineering inspection and nondestructive testing of pressure vessels, heat exchangers, boilers, piping, and structures in the fields of oil refinery, power plant, petrochemical plant, ship building, offshore, bridge and building construction, and other various heavy industries. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
